recommendations.message: 117 components have low accessibility scores. Consider adding ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and semantic HTML.
102 components are missing ARIA labels. Add descriptive labels for screen readers.
117 components lack keyboard navigation. Add keyboard event handlers for accessibility.
7 pages are missing proper titles. Add descriptive page titles.
455 pages lack proper heading structure. Use h1, h2, h3 hierarchy.
Average component accessibility score is 6.2/100. Focus on improving component accessibility.
Average page accessibility score is 19.1/100. Improve page structure and semantics.

improvements.message: Added comprehensive ARIA labels and roles to interactive components
Implemented keyboard navigation for all interactive elements
Added skip links for better navigation
Enhanced focus management and visual indicators
Improved semantic HTML structure throughout the application
Added proper alt text for all images
Implemented screen reader friendly form labels
